project_info.name: NSW Procurement Platform
project_info.description: AI-Powered Compliant Procurement for NSW Local Government

features.name: User Authentication System
features.description: Complete sign-in, registration, and user management
features.stakeholder_impact: Enables secure access for all users

features.name: Main Dashboard
features.description: Central dashboard for procurement type selection
features.stakeholder_impact: Primary interface for all procurement activities

features.name: AI Tender Generator
features.description: AI-powered tender document generation using Gemini 1.5 Flash
features.stakeholder_impact: Automates tender creation, reducing time from days to hours

features.name: AI-Enhanced TEPP Generator
features.description: Advanced TEPP generator with AI assistance
features.stakeholder_impact: Streamlines evaluation process for procurement teams

features.name: AI Contract Review System
features.description: AI-powered contract analysis and risk assessment
features.stakeholder_impact: Reduces contract review time and improves accuracy

features.name: Three-Tier RAG System
features.stakeholder_impact: Enables real-time compliance checking and document intelligence

features.name: AI Compliance Dashboard
features.description: Real-time compliance monitoring and violation tracking
features.stakeholder_impact: Ensures all procurement activities meet NSW standards

features.name: Document Upload & Processing
features.description: Automated document processing and RAG integration
features.stakeholder_impact: Automates document classification and compliance checking

features.name: AI Quote Generator
features.stakeholder_impact: Streamlines quote creation for suppliers and contractors

features.name: Historical Project Matching
features.description: AI-powered matching of new projects with historical data
features.stakeholder_impact: Improves project planning and cost estimation accuracy
